name.description: The official product or project name. Return the submitted name if it is already correct.

summary.description: A neutral one-sentence description of what it is and does. Do not include hype or personal judgment.

type.description: The single closest toolbox type. A hosted commercial product is a service; runnable developer software is a tool; reusable code consumed by other code is a library.

topics.description: Two to six concise lowercase technical topics.

languages.description: Primary programming languages, or an empty array when not applicable or unknown.

license.description: The SPDX license identifier when confirmed from an authoritative source; otherwise null.

license_note.description: A concise factual licensing caveat when different packages, editions, or features use different licenses or require a commercial license; otherwise null.

homepage.description: Canonical official homepage URL, or null.

documentation.description: Canonical official documentation URL, or null.

repository.description: Canonical source repository URL, normally GitHub or GitLab, or null.

package.description: Canonical package registry URL, or null.
